rationale: The synthetic check requires proving r1->Some_0 == r2->Some_0 (Vec<u8> structural equality in spec mode) from only optional_value_view(ov) == optional_value_view(r{1,2}) (Seq view equality). Vec is an external_body type in Verus and its spec-level `==` is not determined by view-equality (confirmed with a minimal test: `v1@ == v2@ ==> v1 == v2` fails to verify). No vstd axiom (group_vec_axioms, ext_equal, =~=) bridges Seq view equality to Vec equality, and the proof block cannot use assume/admit/external_body. clone_optional_value's underspecified ensures (only Seq-view equality) is exactly what this determinism check is designed to catch.
